input.product_description: AI ad tool that generates hooks, ad copy, platform-specific strategy, and creative directions for founders.
input.target_audience: Startup founders and growth marketers who run paid acquisition in-house
key_benefits: Launch more ad variations in minutes
Generate sharper hooks for cold traffic
Turn one campaign brief into ready-to-test creative packages
input.visual_style: cinematic SaaS ads with founder energy

hooks.text: Most founders are testing ads backwards. Here is the fix.
hooks.rationale: Calls out a hidden mistake and opens a curiosity gap.

hooks.text: Turn one product brief into 20 ad variations before lunch.
hooks.rationale: Makes the speed benefit concrete and highly visual.

angles.name: Problem to System
angles.description: Founders are drowning in repetitive ideation and need a repeatable engine.

angles.name: Founder Leverage
angles.description: Position Marko AI as the multiplier for lean growth teams.

ad_copies.hook_text: Most founders are testing ads backwards. Here is the fix.
ad_copies.primary_text: Most ad teams waste days on weak hooks. Marko AI turns one brief into sharp messaging, angle stacks, and ready-to-test ad packages in minutes.
ad_copies.headline: Stop Testing Ads Backwards

ad_copies.hook_text: Turn one product brief into 20 ad variations before lunch.
ad_copies.primary_text: If your growth team is small, your creative system has to be unfairly efficient. Marko AI helps founders spin one offer into multiple ads fast.
ad_copies.headline: 20 Variations, One Brief
